name: @ggui-samples/agent-google-adk
description: Reference sample: a Google ADK (TypeScript) app that hosts the ggui MCP server, with a React chat UI built on @ggui-ai/react's <AppRenderer> + @ggui-ai/dev-stack's sandbox-proxy. Boots an HTTP server (default port 6792) + sandbox-proxy server (default port 7792) and serves the chat shell + an SSE-streamed /chat endpoint. Real LLM via GEMINI_API_KEY. Not published.
